cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Tiffany could have gone to the market. So between 9am to 10am she's at the water park. Then there's a time gap between 10am and 12pm. Wait, no, after 10am, what's next? Then Mary saw her working out at the gym from 6pm to 10pm. And the market is closed after 10pm. B) 10am to 12pm – This is a time when we don't know what she was doing. She could have gone to the market during this time. Let's check if there's anything else conflicting.
